text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Ohhh... This is... the dawn of fortunate<n>prospects...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Oh... Trainer... But of course I am...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... Time and time again, all of my<n>predictions
brought me "great<n>misfortune." It won't surprise
you to<n>hear that my hands were shaking as I<n>held
the crystal ball...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
However, in my morning divination<n>session, the
result read "slightly<n>modest fortune"!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I've been sacrificing my sleep these<n>past few
days to win some good luck,<n>and now fortune
shines upon me...<n>And with such overwhelming
brightness...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: It's like a warm, fuzzy feeling insideof me... Yawn...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Matikanefukukitaru is sleepy for the<n>rest of the
day.
